sentiment.summary: Markets rally toward record highs as Iran peace talks cut geopolitical risk, strong bank earnings open Q1 season, and AI-driven tech demand lifts Nasdaq nearly 2%.

insights.text: S&P 500 near 7,000 — markets surge on Iran peace hopes and strong bank earnings. BofA and Morgan Stanley crushed Q1 estimates. Ceasefire optimism tanks oil 3%. AI remains the dominant growth engine and this rally has real legs behind it.

BTC at $73,830 — just above your $73,135 cost basis. ETF demand supports price; key resistance sits at $75K. A clean breakout there would ignite the next bull leg. Geopolitical tensions keeping short-term risk appetite cautious.

Rocket Lab at $72.90 — 17% above your $62.04 cost basis. Mynaric acquisition complete; new electric satellite thruster unveiled. 15 analysts rate Buy with $71 avg target. Space sector momentum is strong — hold with conviction.

EchoStar at $131.58, brushing its all-time high of $132.43. Up 15% from your $114.33 cost. Spectrum sale to AT&T and SpaceX slashes balance sheet risk and unlocks shareholder value. Earnings May 7 is the next catalyst — looking solid.

T1 Energy at $4.86 — 28% below your $6.73 cost basis. Today priced a $160M convertible note offering to fund Phase 1 of the 2.1 GW Austin solar fab. Near-term dilution hurts, but proceeds confirm construction is moving. Watch execution risk closely.

Seagate at $528 — 17% above your $448.98 cost, up 35% this month. AI-driven storage demand is exploding; Q3 earnings April 28 is the next major print. Analysts avg target is $427 but momentum is overpowering the valuation concern.

Telesat at $43.15 — 29% above your $33.33 cost basis. Lightspeed LEO landing stations coming online in Quebec and Saskatchewan. First satellite launch December 2026. Multi-year build story — stay long and be patient.

BigBear.ai at $3.65 — down 59% from your $9.02 cost. Q4 revenue collapsed 38% YoY to $27.3M; gross margin cratered from 37% to 20%. Platform pivot is unproven. Needs a major contract win to reverse course — reassess your thesis.

Nebius at $156.85 — 20% above your $131.12 cost and accelerating. $27B Meta AI contract is transformational. Goldman raised target to $205, BofA to $175. Revenue guidance $3–3.4B for 2026. Your strongest holding right now — add on dips.

Oklo at $58.59 — 53% below your $125 cost basis. Pre-revenue; reactor criticality target July 4, 2026. Goldman cut target to $55. Rolls-Royce SMR news sparked a brief pop but faded. No near-term revenue catalyst — speculative hold only.

Navitas Semiconductor at $9.87 — nearly flat to your $10.00 cost. GaN and SiC chips serve EV and data center markets. Earnings May 7. No major news today. Needs a broader EV demand recovery to break out — hold and be patient.
